title: Digital Trade Officer Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency is a licensed full-fledged Human Resource firm with extensive expertise and experience in human Capital development and staffing. Future Moves has exceptional expertise in Talent Sourcing, learning & development, talent management, HR Outsourcing & Payrolling, HR planning & Consulting, Policy Drafting, Culture Change and Organisation Effectiveness by designing and implementing interventions which identify the core areas of development to enhance the overall growth and competitiveness of your organization.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Trade Officer

Job Location: Festac Town, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Key Responsibilities


	Manage and monitor digital trading transactions across various platforms.
	Assist customers with digital trade enquiries, account issues, or transaction-related requests.
	Process trade orders, verify transaction details, and ensure accuracy in digital records.
	Collaborate with internal teams to resolve transaction issues and escalate technical problems when necessary.
	Maintain proper documentation of all digital trade activities.
	Prepare periodic reports on digital transactions and operational updates.
	Promote adherence to the organization’s financial and compliance policies.
	Provide excellent customer service to ensure client satisfaction.
	Assist in onboarding customers for digital services and platforms.


Requirements


	Minimum of an OND qualification in Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or related fields.
	Strong computer literacy and ability to use digital platforms.
	Excellent communication skills—must be able to read, write, and speak English fluently.
	Good customer service and interpersonal skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Basic understanding of digital financial transactions (added advantage).




Salary
N150,000 monthly.



Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV as a PDF to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Accommodation will be available for night shifts as it is an eight-hour daily job for 6 days a week.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "Ren San &amp; Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers, we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Operations Manager will oversee the daily operations and overall management of Hilwa Heights Luxury Apartments &amp; Villas to ensure smooth, efficient, and high-quality service delivery across all departments.
	The role requires managing staff, coordinating operational activities, maintaining luxury hospitality standards, and ensuring exceptional guest experiences at all times.
	The Operations Manager will supervise all operational units, including front desk, housekeeping, kitchen staff, maintenance, security, drivers, gardeners, and facility support teams.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all apartments are guest-ready, facilities are fully functional, operational processes run efficiently, and staff maintain professionalism and accountability.
	This position requires a highly organised, proactive, and disciplined individual with strong leadership skills, excellent communication ability, operational intelligence, and the capacity to work effectively in a fast-paced luxury hospitality environment.
	The ideal candidate must be able to manage multiple responsibilities simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail and operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities
Operations and Facility Management:


	Oversee the daily operations of all apartments and facility areas.
	Ensure apartments, guest areas, and facilities meet luxury hospitality standards at all times.
	Coordinate all departments to ensure smooth operational flow.
	Conduct regular inspections of apartments, facilities, equipment, and operational areas.
	Ensure proper maintenance and functionality of all facilities and utilities.
	Monitor inventory levels, operational supplies, and procurement needs.
	Liaise with external vendors, contractors, and service providers when necessary.


Staff Supervision and Coordination:


	Supervise front desk, housekeeping, kitchen staff, maintenance personnel, security officers, drivers, and gardeners.
	Prepare staff schedules and coordinate shift operations.
	Monitor staff punctuality, grooming, discipline, and performance.
	Ensure staff compliance with operational procedures and company standards.
	Provide guidance, direction, and support to all operational staff.
	Address operational issues and staff concerns promptly and professionally.


Guest Experience and Hospitality Management:


	Ensure guests receive excellent customer service and hospitality experiences.
	Handle guest complaints, escalations, and special requests professionally.
	Ensure quick resolution of operational and guest-related issues.
	Monitor guest feedback and implement improvements where necessary.
	Maintain a professional, calm, and service-oriented environment within the facility.


Reporting and Administrative Duties:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly operational reports.
	Maintain records relating to operations, maintenance, inventory, and staffing.
	Monitor operational costs and support budget management.
	Ensure proper documentation and reporting of incidents or operational concerns.
	Support management with operational planning and decision-making.


Performance Expectations


	Smooth coordination of all operational departments.
	High standards of cleanliness, hospitality, and facility management.
	Effective supervision and accountability of staff.
	Positive guest experiences and satisfaction levels.
	Timely resolution of operational and facility-related issues.
	Efficient reporting, communication, and operational planning.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND qualification in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in hospitality operations, hotel management, luxury apartments, or Airbnb management.
	Previous supervisory or managerial experience is required.
	Strong understanding of hospitality operations and customer service standards.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications and reporting tools.
	Strong leadership, organisational, and problem-solving abilities.


Candidate Requirements:


	Female preferred.
	Single status preferred.
	Age range: 25 &ndash; 36 years.
	Must reside within reasonable proximity to Maitama including Wuse, Wuye, Life Camp, Kado, or Lugbe.
	Candidates residing in distant outskirts will not be considered.
	Must be flexible with work schedules and operational demands.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Strong leadership and staff management ability.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High level of professionalism and emotional intelligence.
	Strong attention to detail and operational efficiency.
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure.
	Proactive, organised, and solution-oriented mindset.
	Strong decision-making and conflict-resolution skills.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.


Working Conditions:


	Full-time role based in Maitama, Abuja.
	Working hours are 8:30 AM &ndash; 6:00 PM.
	May require availability beyond regular hours based on operational needs.
	Fast-paced hospitality environment requiring flexibility, responsiveness, and professionalism.


Application Closing Date
15th May, 2026.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;amy@rensan.co.uk&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Operations Manager Job at Ren San & Co




        
    

        
        Ren San & Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers, we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Operations Manager will oversee the daily operations and overall management of Hilwa Heights Luxury Apartments & Villas to ensure smooth, efficient, and high-quality service delivery across all departments.
	The role requires managing staff, coordinating operational activities, maintaining luxury hospitality standards, and ensuring exceptional guest experiences at all times.
	The Operations Manager will supervise all operational units, including front desk, housekeeping, kitchen staff, maintenance, security, drivers, gardeners, and facility support teams.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all apartments are guest-ready, facilities are fully functional, operational processes run efficiently, and staff maintain professionalism and accountability.
	This position requires a highly organised, proactive, and disciplined individual with strong leadership skills, excellent communication ability, operational intelligence, and the capacity to work effectively in a fast-paced luxury hospitality environment.
	The ideal candidate must be able to manage multiple responsibilities simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail and operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities
Operations and Facility Management:


	Oversee the daily operations of all apartments and facility areas.
	Ensure apartments, guest areas, and facilities meet luxury hospitality standards at all times.
	Coordinate all departments to ensure smooth operational flow.
	Conduct regular inspections of apartments, facilities, equipment, and operational areas.
	Ensure proper maintenance and functionality of all facilities and utilities.
	Monitor inventory levels, operational supplies, and procurement needs.
	Liaise with external vendors, contractors, and service providers when necessary.


Staff Supervision and Coordination:


	Supervise front desk, housekeeping, kitchen staff, maintenance personnel, security officers, drivers, and gardeners.
	Prepare staff schedules and coordinate shift operations.
	Monitor staff punctuality, grooming, discipline, and performance.
	Ensure staff compliance with operational procedures and company standards.
	Provide guidance, direction, and support to all operational staff.
	Address operational issues and staff concerns promptly and professionally.


Guest Experience and Hospitality Management:


	Ensure guests receive excellent customer service and hospitality experiences.
	Handle guest complaints, escalations, and special requests professionally.
	Ensure quick resolution of operational and guest-related issues.
	Monitor guest feedback and implement improvements where necessary.
	Maintain a professional, calm, and service-oriented environment within the facility.


Reporting and Administrative Duties:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly operational reports.
	Maintain records relating to operations, maintenance, inventory, and staffing.
	Monitor operational costs and support budget management.
	Ensure proper documentation and reporting of incidents or operational concerns.
	Support management with operational planning and decision-making.


Performance Expectations


	Smooth coordination of all operational departments.
	High standards of cleanliness, hospitality, and facility management.
	Effective supervision and accountability of staff.
	Positive guest experiences and satisfaction levels.
	Timely resolution of operational and facility-related issues.
	Efficient reporting, communication, and operational planning.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND qualification in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	3–5 years of experience in hospitality operations, hotel management, luxury apartments, or Airbnb management.
	Previous supervisory or managerial experience is required.
	Strong understanding of hospitality operations and customer service standards.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications and reporting tools.
	Strong leadership, organisational, and problem-solving abilities.


Candidate Requirements:


	Female preferred.
	Single status preferred.
	Age range: 25 – 36 years.
	Must reside within reasonable proximity to Maitama including Wuse, Wuye, Life Camp, Kado, or Lugbe.
	Candidates residing in distant outskirts will not be considered.
	Must be flexible with work schedules and operational demands.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Strong leadership and staff management ability.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High level of professionalism and emotional intelligence.
	Strong attention to detail and operational efficiency.
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure.
	Proactive, organised, and solution-oriented mindset.
	Strong decision-making and conflict-resolution skills.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.


Working Conditions:


	Full-time role based in Maitama, Abuja.
	Working hours are 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM.
	May require availability beyond regular hours based on operational needs.
	Fast-paced hospitality environment requiring flexibility, responsiveness, and professionalism.


Application Closing Date
15th May, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Whip-Smart Service Providers Limited is an&nbsp;HR Recruiting Firm, bridging the gap between job seekers and employers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid/Remote)
Reporting Line: Finance Manager / Financial Controller
Working Hours: Monday &ndash; Friday, 9:00am &ndash; 5:00pm

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Accountant to manage financial records, support reporting processes, and ensure compliance with accounting and tax regulations.
	The ideal candidate must be analytical, organized, and able to work effectively within deadlines while maintaining confidentiality and accuracy.
	Candidates from the South-South or South Eastern part of Nigeria are preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day accounting transactions, including journals, accruals, and postings to the general ledger
	Prepare and review monthly bank, vendor, customer, and balance sheet reconciliations; investigate and resolve variances
	Support monthly, quarterly, and annual close activities while ensuring accurate documentation
	Prepare management reports and financial statements including profit &amp; loss, balance sheet, and cash flow reports
	Maintain accounts payable and receivable records; monitor payments and follow up where necessary
	Compute and support filing of tax payments/returns such as VAT, WHT, and PAYE
	Assist during external audits and internal reviews by preparing schedules and supporting documents
	Ensure proper filing systems, record retention, and confidentiality of financial data
	Support budgeting and forecasting processes through financial analysis and reporting
	Identify and recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency and compliance


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant accounting experience
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in accounting software/ERP systems and Microsoft Excel
	Professional certification, such as ACA, ACCA, CPA, or CIMA, is an added advantage


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent organizational and time management skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively.


Salary
N250,000 &ndash; N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;whipsmartrecruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Accountant &ndash; Lekki&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Accountant Job at Whip-Smart Service Providers Limited




        
    

        
        Whip-Smart Service Providers Limited is an HR Recruiting Firm, bridging the gap between job seekers and employers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid/Remote)
Reporting Line: Finance Manager / Financial Controller
Working Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Accountant to manage financial records, support reporting processes, and ensure compliance with accounting and tax regulations.
	The ideal candidate must be analytical, organized, and able to work effectively within deadlines while maintaining confidentiality and accuracy.
	Candidates from the South-South or South Eastern part of Nigeria are preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day accounting transactions, including journals, accruals, and postings to the general ledger
	Prepare and review monthly bank, vendor, customer, and balance sheet reconciliations; investigate and resolve variances
	Support monthly, quarterly, and annual close activities while ensuring accurate documentation
	Prepare management reports and financial statements including profit & loss, balance sheet, and cash flow reports
	Maintain accounts payable and receivable records; monitor payments and follow up where necessary
	Compute and support filing of tax payments/returns such as VAT, WHT, and PAYE
	Assist during external audits and internal reviews by preparing schedules and supporting documents
	Ensure proper filing systems, record retention, and confidentiality of financial data
	Support budgeting and forecasting processes through financial analysis and reporting
	Identify and recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency and compliance


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline
	2–5 years of relevant accounting experience
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in accounting software/ERP systems and Microsoft Excel
	Professional certification, such as ACA, ACCA, CPA, or CIMA, is an added advantage


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent organizational and time management skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively.


Salary
N250,000 – N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Accountant – Lekki” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited &nbsp;- Our client,&nbsp;Spesa Super Store is a fast-growing retail brand in Ikorodu, Lagos, offering quality groceries, household items, bakery products, and ready-to-eat meals.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Sales Representative will be responsible for assisting customers, driving in-store sales, ensuring proper product display, and maintaining a high level of customer satisfaction.
	This role is ideal for individuals who are energetic, customer-focused, and sales-oriented.
	The Sales Representative will be responsible for assisting customers, ensuring smooth sales operations, maintaining product displays, and achieving daily sales targets.
	You will play a key role in ensuring that every customer enjoys a satisfying shopping experience and that store goals are met.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to customers promptly and professionally.
	Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products.
	Provide accurate information about products, prices, and promotions.
	Ensure proper product display, labeling, and shelf arrangement.
	Monitor inventory levels and report stock shortages or fast-moving products.
	Record and process sales transactions accurately.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Handle customer complaints or inquiries courteously and escalate when necessary.
	Support daily store operations and maintain cleanliness and orderliness.
	Participate in periodic stock-taking and promotional activities.


Requirements


	Minimum of&nbsp;OND / NCE&nbsp;/&nbsp;HND / BSc&nbsp;is an added advantage.
	1&ndash;3 years of proven experience as a sales representative, preferably in a supermarket, retail, or FMCG environment.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good knowledge of retail sales techniques and customer service principles.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and multitask efficiently.
	Smart appearance, honesty, and strong work ethic.
	Basic computer literacy (POS operation knowledge is an added advantage).


Skills &amp; Attributes:


	Strong persuasive and problem-solving skills.
	Positive attitude and team spirit.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.
	Goal-oriented and results-driven personality.


Benefits


	Competitive salary plus sales bonuses.
	Career growth opportunities within the Spesa Group.
	Staff discounts on in-store products.
	Health and welfare benefits.
	Continuous sales and customer service training.

Sales Representative Job at Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited  - Our client, Spesa Super Store is a fast-growing retail brand in Ikorodu, Lagos, offering quality groceries, household items, bakery products, and ready-to-eat meals.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Sales Representative will be responsible for assisting customers, driving in-store sales, ensuring proper product display, and maintaining a high level of customer satisfaction.
	This role is ideal for individuals who are energetic, customer-focused, and sales-oriented.
	The Sales Representative will be responsible for assisting customers, ensuring smooth sales operations, maintaining product displays, and achieving daily sales targets.
	You will play a key role in ensuring that every customer enjoys a satisfying shopping experience and that store goals are met.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to customers promptly and professionally.
	Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products.
	Provide accurate information about products, prices, and promotions.
	Ensure proper product display, labeling, and shelf arrangement.
	Monitor inventory levels and report stock shortages or fast-moving products.
	Record and process sales transactions accurately.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Handle customer complaints or inquiries courteously and escalate when necessary.
	Support daily store operations and maintain cleanliness and orderliness.
	Participate in periodic stock-taking and promotional activities.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / NCE / HND / BSc is an added advantage.
	1–3 years of proven experience as a sales representative, preferably in a supermarket, retail, or FMCG environment.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good knowledge of retail sales techniques and customer service principles.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and multitask efficiently.
	Smart appearance, honesty, and strong work ethic.
	Basic computer literacy (POS operation knowledge is an added advantage).


Skills & Attributes:


	Strong persuasive and problem-solving skills.
	Positive attitude and team spirit.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.
	Goal-oriented and results-driven personality.


Benefits


	Competitive salary plus sales bonuses.
	Career growth opportunities within the Spesa Group.
	Staff discounts on in-store products.
	Health and welfare benefits.
	Continuous sales and customer service training.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
